data.description: Phase 5: Build the /update-site Claude skill. Quick mode (one-liner input) and developed mode (rich input with images/links). Content generation pipeline: user input to formatted MDX. Deployment pipeline: new content to git commit to auto-deploy. Test full loop: skill to live site in under 5 minutes. Deliverable: working Claude skill + docs.
data.title: Claude skill for daily updates

data.body: Pulled into MVP scope as Task 5b. Now depends on ASMV-15 (content format design) instead of ASMV-6. The /update-site Claude skill: quick mode (one-liner → MDX) and developed mode (rich input). Output: MDX to src/content/now/YYYY-MM-DD.mdx. Git integration: commit + push triggers auto-deploy. Must match content schema from ASMV-15.
Replaced by clean task (ASMV-18) with correct dependencies. Old task had stale dep on ASMV-6.
